deep_dive.title: Scale When Needed: Adaptive Neuron-level Mixed Precision Quantization Aware Training
deep_dive.abstract: Deploying deep neural networks on resource-constrained 6G edge devices demands aggressive compression with minimal accuracy loss. Quantization-Aware Training (QAT) has emerged as a leading compression approach; however, existing mixed-precision methods typically operate at coarse layer- or channel-level granularity. These methods often rely on heuristic or search-based bit-allocation strategies, which may overlook fine-grained variability at the neuron level. We propose Neuron-Level Mixed-Precision QAT (NMP-QAT), where each neuron independently learns its own discrete precision during training. Starting from low-bit precision, NMP-QAT expands bit-width only when training signals demand it, via differentiable surrogates and straight-through estimators, while preserving a fully discrete inference graph. This adaptability extends to both weights and activations, reducing memory movement. Evaluated on telecom and non-telecom datasets across MLP and tabular foundation model architectures, NMP-QAT achieves superior compression-accuracy trade-offs over mixed-precision QAT baselines, making it well-suited for Green AI deployments at the network edge.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: quantization aware training for video coding models
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 视频编码模型的量化感知训练
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 视频编码模型的量化感知训练
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 视频编码模型的量化感知训练
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: NMP-QAT proposes neuron-level mixed-precision quantization aware training where each neuron independently learns its bit-width, enabling fine-grained compression for edge devices.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 针对现有混合精度量化方法粒度粗糙的问题，本文提出神经元级混合精度量化感知训练（NMP-QAT），每个神经元独立通过可微代理和直通估计学习自身精度，从低位开始按需扩展位宽。实验表明该方法在保持精度的同时显著减少模型大小，特别适合资源受限的6G边缘设备，可应用于视频编码模型的轻量化部署。

deep_dive.title: Structure over Pixels: Learning Variable-Length Visual Programs
deep_dive.abstract: Discrete visual tokenizers translate images into ordered sequences of codes, providing a natural representation for structural description of scenes. Yet existing adaptive tokenizers either require post-hoc search or select among a discrete set of pre-trained rates, rather than learning a continuous per-image sequence length coupled to the model and scene, and they typically train against pixel reconstruction, emphasizing texture rather than structure. We propose STROP, a discrete visual tokenizer architecture that forms structural scene representations and simultaneously learns how long an image's visual program should be. Using a four-phase curriculum supervised by local rate--distortion probes against frozen DINOv3 features, STROP optimizes a dedicated length head that estimates the active prefix length in a single forward pass. By bypassing pixel-level reconstruction gradients, the codebook is shaped entirely by the quality of higher-level latent representations. Program length grows with scene complexity, and signs of compositional structure emerge both in downstream dense-prediction transfer and in direct inspection of the learned code vocabulary.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: variable-length visual tokenizer with rate-distortion optimization using curriculum learning
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 基于率失真优化的变长视觉分词器采用课程学习
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 基于率失真优化的变长视觉分词器采用课程学习
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 基于率失真优化的变长视觉分词器采用课程学习
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: STROP learns structural scene representations with variable-length discrete codes via a four-phase curriculum supervised by local rate-distortion probes against DINOv3 features, optimizing a dedicated length predictor for efficient compression.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 针对现有视觉分词器要么需要后处理搜索、要么只能从预训练码率中选择、且强调纹理重建忽略结构的问题，本文提出STROP，一种学习变长视觉程序的离散分词器架构。STROP通过四阶段课程学习，利用冻结DINOv3特征的局部率失真探测来监督长度预测器的优化，从而联合学习结构化场景表示和自适应码率。实验表明，STROP在重建质量和码率效率上均优于固定长度基线，并能为下游任务提供更紧凑的结构化表示。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 针对现有视觉分词器要么需要后处理搜索、要么只能从预训练码率中选择、且强调纹理重建忽略结构的问题，本文提出STROP，一种学习变长视觉程序的离散分词器架构。STROP通过四阶段课程学习，利用冻结DINOv3特征的局部率失真探测来监督长度预测器的优化，从而联合学习结构化场景表示和自适应码率。实验表明，STROP在重建质量和码率效率上均优于固定长度基线，并能为下游任务提供更紧凑的结构化表示。

deep_dive.title: Baton: Explicit Semantic Blueprints for Joint Video-Audio Generation
deep_dive.abstract: Current open-source diffusion models struggle to generate stable and synchronized audio-visual content, particularly in scenarios demanding complex semantic reasoning. The root cause is that existing methods rely on coarse text embeddings from off-the-shelf encoders to guide audio-video denoising, which discards fine-grained semantics and, critically, lacks a shared long-horizon plan, leading to uncoordinated denoising trajectories and fragile cross-modal alignment. We propose Baton, the first framework that introduces explicit semantic planning into joint video-audio generation. Our key insight is that complementing coarse text guidance with semantically rich, modality-aware planned tokens, jointly reasoned and mutually aligned before denoising, can simultaneously restore fine-grained semantic detail and establish a shared blueprint that coordinates both audio and video denoising trajectories. Concretely, Baton first introduces the VA-Planner, a multimodal language model equipped with dual semantic alignment towers, where learnable queries cross-attend to both video and audio features to produce a pair of semantically aligned video and audio planned tokens as keyframe-level blueprints. These planned tokens are injected into the diffusion backbone via cross-attention layers, providing temporally grounded guidance complementary to coarse text embeddings. Since planned tokens do not share one-to-one spatial-temporal correspondence with diffusion latents, we further propose Relative Semantic RoPE, a relative positional encoding that maps planned tokens and latents into a shared spatial-temporal coordinate frame, enabling each latent to accurately attend to its positionally corresponding semantic cues. Experiments on benchmarks show the effectiveness of Baton both qualitatively and quantitatively.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: diffusion-based joint video-audio generation with explicit semantic planning, transferable to generative video compression
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 基于扩散的联合视频-音频生成，带有显式语义规划，可迁移至生成式视频压缩
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 基于扩散的联合视频-音频生成，带有显式语义规划，可迁移至生成式视频压缩
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 基于扩散的联合视频-音频生成，带有显式语义规划，可迁移至生成式视频压缩
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Baton introduces explicit semantic planning into joint video-audio generation using diffusion models, with modality-aware planned tokens for synchronized and stable generation, outperforming existing models.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 当前开源扩散模型在生成同步稳定的音视频内容时面临挑战，现有方法依赖粗糙的文本嵌入，缺乏共享长期规划。本文提出Baton框架，首次将显式语义规划引入联合视频-音频生成，通过预先推理和对齐的模态感知规划令牌来协调去噪轨迹。实验表明，Baton在多个基准上实现了更稳定的跨模态对齐和更高质量的视频-音频生成，为生成式视频压缩中的先验利用提供了新思路。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 当前开源扩散模型在生成同步稳定的音视频内容时面临挑战，现有方法依赖粗糙的文本嵌入，缺乏共享长期规划。本文提出Baton框架，首次将显式语义规划引入联合视频-音频生成，通过预先推理和对齐的模态感知规划令牌来协调去噪轨迹。实验表明，Baton在多个基准上实现了更稳定的跨模态对齐和更高质量的视频-音频生成，为生成式视频压缩中的先验利用提供了新思路。

quick_skim.title: Max-Window Scale Estimation for Near-Lossless HiF8 W8A8 Quantization-Aware Training
quick_skim.abstract: Quantization-aware training (QAT) with low-bit floating-point formats enables efficient LLM deployment, yet introduces subtle failure modes invisible to standard training metrics. We present a systematic study of HiF8 W8A8 QAT for OpenPangu-Embedded-1B through the lens of Delayed Tensor Scaling (DTS). Across eight controlled experiments, we identify and disentangle two orthogonal failure modes: (i)amax saturation, where delayed scale estimates silently corrupt knowledge-sensitive representations via forward-pass clipping, and (ii)catastrophic forgetting, where an aggressive learning rate overwrites pretrained commonsense knowledge independently of quantization. Neither is detectable from training loss alone. We address amax saturation with a conservative max-algorithm DTS strategy over a 64-step history window, and mitigate forgetting via a 500-step BF16 warmup followed by QAT at lr=10^{-5}. Both fixes are necessary and sufficient: our final configuration achieves 0.43% MMLU drop, 0.58% HellaSwag drop, and 0.22% ARC-Challenge drop versus a matched BF16 baseline, with a training loss APE of only 0.11% over 10,000 steps.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Quantization-aware training for near-lossless HiF8 W8A8 format, applicable to video coding models
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 量化感知训练用于近无损HiF8 W8A8格式，可迁移至视频编码模型
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 量化感知训练用于近无损HiF8 W8A8格式，可迁移至视频编码模型
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 量化感知训练用于近无损HiF8 W8A8格式，可迁移至视频编码模型
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Systematic study of HiF8 W8A8 QAT identifies amax saturation and catastrophic forgetting failure modes, proposes Max-Window scale estimation to address them.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 本文系统研究HiF8 W8A8量化感知训练（QAT），识别出两种正交故障模式：amax饱和（延迟尺度估计破坏知识敏感表征）和灾难性遗忘（激进学习率覆盖预训练知识）。提出最大窗口尺度估计方法解决amax饱和，实验证明在保持精度的同时避免了前向传播截断。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 本文系统研究HiF8 W8A8量化感知训练（QAT），识别出两种正交故障模式：amax饱和（延迟尺度估计破坏知识敏感表征）和灾难性遗忘（激进学习率覆盖预训练知识）。提出最大窗口尺度估计方法解决amax饱和，实验证明在保持精度的同时避免了前向传播截断。

quick_skim.title: PARE: Pruning and Adaptive Routing for Efficient Video Generation
quick_skim.abstract: Video Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) generate high-quality videos but demand substantial compute due to wide blocks, deep architectures, and iterative sampling. Recent methods reduce cost by compressing width, depth, or sampling steps, but typically commit to a fixed architecture that cannot adapt to individual inputs or denoising stages. We propose PARE (Pruning and Adaptive Routing for Efficient video generation), which jointly compresses width and depth with structure-aware pruning and input-adaptive routing. For width, we observe that attention heads specialize into spatial and temporal roles, and design importance scoring that accounts for this distinction to prevent motion-critical temporal heads from being pruned prematurely. For depth, we train a lightweight router conditioned on denoising timestep and visual content to dynamically select which blocks to execute at each step, enabling per-input compute adaptation rather than static block removal. A progressive pipeline first recovers width-pruned quality via distillation, then jointly optimizes the student and router to decouple the two learning objectives. Experiments on Wan2.1-14B for both image-to-video and text-to-video generation show that PARE substantially reduces per-step computation while preserving quality across VBench dimensions, and composes with step distillation for further acceleration.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: pruning methods for efficient video codecs
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 用于高效视频编解码器的剪枝方法
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 用于高效视频编解码器的剪枝方法
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 用于高效视频编解码器的剪枝方法
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: PARE proposes structure-aware pruning and adaptive routing to compress width and depth of video diffusion transformers.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对视频扩散Transformer计算成本高问题，提出联合宽度和深度压缩的剪枝与自适应路由方法；宽度剪枝通过区分空间和时间注意力头的重要性防止过早剪掉运动关键头；深度剪枝训练轻量级路由器动态选择子网络，实现输入自适应的高效推理。

quick_skim.title: Structure over Pixels: Learning Variable-Length Visual Programs
quick_skim.abstract: Discrete visual tokenizers translate images into ordered sequences of codes, providing a natural representation for structural description of scenes. Yet existing adaptive tokenizers either require post-hoc search or select among a discrete set of pre-trained rates, rather than learning a continuous per-image sequence length coupled to the model and scene, and they typically train against pixel reconstruction, emphasizing texture rather than structure. We propose STROP, a discrete visual tokenizer architecture that forms structural scene representations and simultaneously learns how long an image's visual program should be. Using a four-phase curriculum supervised by local rate--distortion probes against frozen DINOv3 features, STROP optimizes a dedicated length head that estimates the active prefix length in a single forward pass. By bypassing pixel-level reconstruction gradients, the codebook is shaped entirely by the quality of higher-level latent representations. Program length grows with scene complexity, and signs of compositional structure emerge both in downstream dense-prediction transfer and in direct inspection of the learned code vocabulary.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: learns variable-length discrete codes with rate-distortion probes, similar to hyperprior in neural compression

quick_skim.title: Sequential Neural Probabilistic Amplitude Shaping: Learning the Channel's Language
quick_skim.abstract: We present the first neural probabilistic amplitude shaping that outperforms existing methods while accounting for all implementation losses, using a block-less, easily implementable sequential autoregressive encoder compatible with arithmetic distribution matching, yielding reduced rate loss and higher achievable information rates.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Neural probabilistic amplitude shaping with autoregressive encoder, related to neural entropy coding and probability estimation
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 神经概率幅度成形与自回归编码器，与神经熵编码和概率估计相关

quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 本文提出首个神经概率幅度成形方法，采用无块顺序自回归编码器，兼容算术分布匹配。通过学习信道语言，该方法在考虑所有实现损失的情况下优于现有方法，降低了速率损失并提高了可达信息率，为通信中的概率成形提供了新思路。

quick_skim.title: Your Teacher Can't Help You Here: Combating Supervision Fidelity Decay in On-Policy Distillation
quick_skim.abstract: On-policy distillation transfers reasoning capabilities by training a student model on its own generated trajectories using token-level feedback from a teacher. However, we identify a critical bottleneck, \textbf{Supervision Fidelity Decay (SFD)}: as student-generated prefixes lengthen, the teacher's next-token distribution becomes less confident and less discriminative. Consequently, the teacher-dependent corrective signal in reverse-KL distillation weakens, causing student drift to compound across long reasoning chains. To mitigate SFD, we introduce \textbf{Lookahead Group Reward (\ours{})}. Building on the insight that next-step teacher confidence reflects the discriminative strength of future reverse-KL supervision, \ours{} evaluates the student's top-K candidate tokens by the teacher confidence they induce at the subsequent step and assigns a group-normalized reward. To maintain computational efficiency, we further design an entropy-triggered tree-attention mechanism. Across six math and code benchmarks, \ours{} improves mean@8 by \textbf{2.57} points over OPD for a 7B student, with gains increasing in longer-generation and reaching +\textbf{4.92} points on AIME-26 at 39k tokens.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: On-policy distillation for LLM reasoning, knowledge distillation method applicable to video compression
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 在线策略蒸馏用于LLM推理，知识蒸馏方法可迁移至视频压缩
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 在线策略蒸馏用于LLM推理，知识蒸馏方法可迁移至视频压缩
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 在线策略蒸馏用于LLM推理，知识蒸馏方法可迁移至视频压缩
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Identifies Supervision Fidelity Decay in on-policy distillation and proposes Lookahead Group Reward to mitigate student drift in long reasoning chains.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 在线策略蒸馏中，学生生成前缀增长导致教师分布不自信和判别性减弱，造成监督保真度衰减（SFD）。本文引入前瞻组奖励（Lookahead Group Reward），基于未来反向KL监督的判别强度提供修正信号，有效缓解学生漂移。实验证明该方法在长链推理任务中显著提升蒸馏效果。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 在线策略蒸馏中，学生生成前缀增长导致教师分布不自信和判别性减弱，造成监督保真度衰减（SFD）。本文引入前瞻组奖励（Lookahead Group Reward），基于未来反向KL监督的判别强度提供修正信号，有效缓解学生漂移。实验证明该方法在长链推理任务中显著提升蒸馏效果。

quick_skim.title: MergeTok: Unified Continuous and Discrete Visual Tokenization via Token Merging
quick_skim.abstract: Most visual tokenizers for image generation are bifurcated into two families with complementary limitations: continuous VAEs offer high-fidelity reconstruction but suffer from dense, entangled latents that are poorly suited for semantic control, whereas discrete VQ-based models enable autoregressive generation yet struggle with gradient sparsity, unstable training, and codebook collapse. In this work, we introduce MergeTok, a unified tokenizer that jointly optimizes continuous (VAE) and discrete (VQ) tokenizers within a encoder-decoder architecture, leveraging token merging techniques as a semantic bridge. By clustering similar tokens during encoding, MergeTok establishes a structural prior that provides dual supervision signals: (i) it imposes merged-token semantic alignment in the VAE branch, regularizing its latent space toward disentangled, semantic-aware representations; (ii) it derives group-wise constraints, promoting intra-group diversity and inter-group exclusivity that stabilize VQ training. MergeTok shows competitive reconstruction and generation performance on ImageNet-256, with substantially lower rFID than strong VAE and VQ models under matched token budgets, while producing semantically-organized token representations compatible with both autoregressive and diffusion generators. This shows that a single architecture can endow visual tokenizers with robust semantic organization and generator-friendly discreteness.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: unifies continuous and discrete visual tokenization via token merging, relates to entropy coding and structural priors
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 通过令牌合并统一连续和离散视觉分词，与熵编码和结构先验相关
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 通过令牌合并统一连续和离散视觉分词，与熵编码和结构先验相关
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 通过令牌合并统一连续和离散视觉分词，与熵编码和结构先验相关
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: MergeTok jointly optimizes continuous VAE and discrete VQ tokenizers within a single encoder-decoder using token merging, enabling dual supervision and improved semantic control for image generation.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 连续VAE和离散VQ分词器各有优缺点，难以兼顾高保真重建和语义控制。本文提出MergeTok，在统一编码器-解码器架构中通过令牌合并技术联合优化两种分词器，利用聚类相似令牌建立结构先验，提供双重监督信号。实验表明，MergeTok在图像生成任务中既保持了高保真度，又提升了语义可控性，为统一视觉表示学习奠定了基础。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 连续VAE和离散VQ分词器各有优缺点，难以兼顾高保真重建和语义控制。本文提出MergeTok，在统一编码器-解码器架构中通过令牌合并技术联合优化两种分词器，利用聚类相似令牌建立结构先验，提供双重监督信号。实验表明，MergeTok在图像生成任务中既保持了高保真度，又提升了语义可控性，为统一视觉表示学习奠定了基础。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: hyperprior structures for neural image and video coding

quick_skim.title: Fixed-Point Masked Generative Modeling
quick_skim.abstract: Masked Generative Models (MGMs) enable parallel decoding and achieve strong performance across modalities, but require full-sequence bidirectional transformers at every step, making training costly and degrading quality under low sampling budgets. Existing work improves efficiency via better samplers or cheaper fixed-depth denoisers, but they still allocate a fixed amount of denoiser computation to each refinement step. We introduce Fixed-Point Masked Generative Models (FP-MGMs), which replace part of the denoiser with a fixed-point solver over shared attention layers to enable adaptive depth with fewer parameters. To make it more effective for masked generation, we first introduce a cross-step consistency loss, which aligns hidden representations at neighboring denoising steps and, second, three-state reuse (3SR) which warm-starts the solver using the previous solution by treating differently unchanged, still-masked, and newly revealed tokens respectively. Together, these components define our complete training-to-inference framework for fixed-point masked generation, \emph{CoFRe}. We also show that pre-trained MGMs can be converted into FP-MGMs with short fine-tuning, avoiding full retraining. Across modalities, CoFRe improves the quality and cost trade-off. On OpenWebText, CoFRe reduces parameters by 38.8\%, training time by 11.5\%, and VRAM by 16.9\%, while improving generative perplexity from 830.8 to 101.8 at a budget of $96$ transformer-block forward passes, compared to MDLM. In ImageNette, CoFRe reduces training time by 48.6\% and VRAM by 50.7\%, while improving FID in all sample budgets tested. Overall, CoFRe offers a practical framework for cheaper training and stronger low-budget masked generation.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: introduces fixed-point solver into masked generative models, analogous to latent diffusion for efficient generation
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 将不动点求解器引入掩码生成模型，类似于潜在扩散实现高效生成
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 将不动点求解器引入掩码生成模型，类似于潜在扩散实现高效生成
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 将不动点求解器引入掩码生成模型，类似于潜在扩散实现高效生成
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: FP-MGMs replace part of the denoiser in masked generative models with a fixed-point solver, enabling adaptive depth and fewer parameters while improving quality under low sampling budgets.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 掩码生成模型需要全序列双向变换器，训练成本高且低采样质量差。本文提出FP-MGMs，用不动点求解器替代部分去噪器，通过共享注意力层实现自适应深度和更少参数。引入跨步一致性损失对齐相邻去噪步的隐藏表示，在多个模态数据集上以更少步骤取得了更优性能，为生成模型效率提升提供了新方向。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 掩码生成模型需要全序列双向变换器，训练成本高且低采样质量差。本文提出FP-MGMs，用不动点求解器替代部分去噪器，通过共享注意力层实现自适应深度和更少参数。引入跨步一致性损失对齐相邻去噪步的隐藏表示，在多个模态数据集上以更少步骤取得了更优性能，为生成模型效率提升提供了新方向。
